review.note: Demo approval for the pilot - full SME review still required before real rollout.

title: Amaqophelo Ashintshayo: U-1948 Nawo-1950s
subject: History
caps_topic: Turning points in South African history: 1948 and the 1950s

sources.title: Grade 9 - Term 4: Turning points in modern South African History since 1948
Apartheid Legislation 1850s-1970s

Popular struggles in the early years of Apartheid, 1948-1960
Population Registration Act, Act No 30 of 1950
The Group Areas Act of 1950
Timeline of the Group Areas Act and Selected Related Pieces Legislation

Bantu education and the racist compartmentalizing of education

Defiance Campaign timeline 1948-1952

Sophiatown timeline 1899-1955

slides.title: Amaqophelo Ashintshayo: U-1948 Nawo-1950s
slides.lead: Ukhetho lwango-1948 lwenza kanjani ubandlululo (i-apartheid) lwaba umthetho, nokuthi abantu abavamile baseNingizimu Afrika baqala kanjani ukulwisana nalo.

media.alt: Stylised South African landscape divided by a hard line, symbolising racial separation.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='320' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='158' width='4' height='180' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='250' cy='48' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 120 L70 96 L120 116 L170 88 L230 112 L320 90 L320 120 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi yini abasele beyazi ngobandlululo. Beka izingxenye ezimbili zalesi sifundo: (1) imithetho eyashaywa yiNational Party emva kokuthola amandla ngo-1948, kanye (2) nokukhula kokumelana naleyo mithetho phakathi nawo-1950s. Chaza ukuthi 'iqophelo elishintshayo' (turning point) yisikhathi esiguqula indlela umlando ohamba ngayo.

slides.title: INingizimu Afrika ngaphambi kuka-1948
slides.lead: Ukwehlukaniswa ngokwebala akuqalanga ngo-1948 - kodwa u-1948 wakwenza kwahleleka kakhulu futhi kwaphelela.

blocks.text: Ngaphambi kakhulu kuka-1948, imithetho yayivele ihlukanisa abantu baseNingizimu Afrika ngokwebala futhi ilawula ukuthi abantu abamnyama bangahlala, basebenze futhi bahambe kuphi. **Imithetho yamapasi** (pass laws) yaphoqa amadoda amnyama ukuba aphathe amaphepha, kanti uMthetho i-Natives Land Act ka-1913 wabekela abanikazi abamhlophe iningi lomhlaba wamapulazi.

items: Ingcebo nomhlaba kwakuphethwe kakhulu yidlanzana labamhlophe.
Abantu abamnyama, abebala kanye namaNdiya babenamalungelo okuvota amancane noma bengenawo nhlobo.
Ukwehlukaniswa kwakuvamile kodwa kwakungakabi uhlelo olulodwa oluphelele.

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukuqhubeka noshintsho: ukwehlukaniswa kwakukhona ngaphansi kohulumeni bangaphambili, kodwa kwakuhluke ndawonye. Emva kuka-1948 iNational Party yahlanganisa le mithetho ehlukene yaba uhlelo olulodwa oluhlanganisa konke olwaziwa ngobandlululo (apartheid - igama lesiBhunu elisho 'ukwehlukana'). Buyela emuva emagameni angaphambili amayelana nemithetho yamapasi nokuphucwa komhlaba.

slides.title: Ukhetho lwango-1948
slides.lead: Ngomhla ka-26 Meyi 1948 iNational Party yathola amandla ngesithembiso sobandlululo.

blocks.text: I-**National Party (NP)**, eyayiholwa u-**D.F. Malan**, yakhankasa ngesiqubulo se-*apartheid* - ukugcina amaqembu ngokwebala ehlukene ngokuphelele. Ngokubambisana ne-Afrikaner Party yanqoba i-United Party kaJan Smuts.

items: Abavoti abamhlophe kuphela ababekwazi ukubamba iqhaza okhethweni.
I-NP yawina iningi lezihlalo yize yathola amavoti amancane kunawe-United Party.
U-D.F. Malan waba nguNdunankulu waqala ukuguqula ubandlululo lube umthetho.

media.alt: A ballot box with a paper being posted into it.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='55' y='70' width='90' height='70' rx='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='70' y='58' width='60' height='16' rx='2' fill='#5c1414'/><rect x='84' y='30' width='32' height='40' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-12 100 50)'/><rect x='90' y='94' width='20' height='4' fill='#f4efe6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukuthi kungani u-1948 kuyilo IQOPHELO ELISHINTSHAYO laleli yunithi: ushintsho lukahulumeni olwakha ubandlululo ngamabomu. Veza inkinga yobulungiswa - i-NP yawina izihlalo kodwa hhayi amavoti amaningi, ngoba izifunda zasemakhaya (ikakhulukazi zamaBhunu) zaziphathwa ngokusindayo. Qaphela ukuthi izigidi zabantu abamnyama, abebala namaNdiya baseNingizimu Afrika babengenalizwi nhlobo.

slides.title: Ukuguqula ubandlululo lube umthetho
slides.lead: Phakathi kuka-1950 no-1953 uhulumeni washaya uchungechunge lwemithetho lokulawula zonke izingxenye zempilo.

blocks.heading: Hlukanisa ngezigaba
blocks.text: Nquma ukuthi umuntu ngamunye ungaweliphi iqembu lebala.

blocks.heading: Yehlukanisa
blocks.text: Phoqa amaqembu ahlukene ukuba ahlale, afunde futhi asebenze ehlukene.

blocks.heading: Lawula
blocks.text: Thulisa futhi ujezise noma ubani omelana nalolu hlelo.

slides.notes: Beka phambili imithetho emine elandelayo usebenzisa lezi zenzo ezintathu - hlukanisa ngezigaba, yehlukanisa, lawula. Lokhu kunika abafundi uhlaka ukuze le Mithetho ngayinye ingabi uhlu nje lokukhunjulwa kodwa ibe izinyathelo zohlelo olulodwa. Cela abafundi baqagele ukuthi yimuphi umthetho owenza muphi umsebenzi njengoba udlula kumaslayidi alandelayo.

slides.title: Population Registration Act, 1950
slides.lead: Wonke umuntu waseNingizimu Afrika wafakwa eqenjini lebala, elabhaliswa umbuso.

blocks.text: Lo mthetho wawudinga ukuba abantu **behlukaniswe ngokwebala** - njengoMhlophe, oWebala noma iNative (umAfrika omnyama). Abantu abangamaNdiya/base-Asia babuye bengezwa njengeqembu elihlukene kamuva. Ukuhlukaniswa komuntu kwanquma ukuthi angahlala kuphi, asebenze kuphi, aye kuyiphi isikole nokuthi angashada nobani.

items: Izikhulu zazisebenzisa isimo somuntu, umlando womndeni nokwamukeleka emphakathini ukuhlukanisa abantu.
Imindeni yayingahlukaniswa uma amalungu ehlukaniswa ngokwehlukene.
Lo Mthetho waba yisisekelo eyakhelwa kuso eminye imithetho yobandlululo.

media.alt: An identity document book with a photograph and lines of text.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='40' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='64' width='24' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='90' width='68' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='102' width='68' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='114' width='48' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi ukuhlukaniswa ngezigaba kwakuyisikhiye esisemqoka sobandlululo: uma umbuso usumise 'ibala' lakho, yonke eminye imithetho ingasetshenziswa kuwe. Yisho ukuthi ukuhlukaniswa kwakuvamise ukuba nesihluku futhi kunganeni - izelamani zazingabekwa emaqenjini ahlukene. Gcizelela izindleko zobuntu, hhayi imininingwane yomthetho kuphela.

slides.title: Group Areas Act, 1950
slides.lead: Umthetho wahlukanisa amadolobha aba izindawo ezihlukaniswe ngokwebala.

blocks.text: I-Group Areas Act yavumela uhulumeni ukuba abekele iqembu elilodwa lebala noma iyiphi indawo yasedolobheni. Abantu ababehlala endaweni 'engalungile' babengase **basuswe ngenkani** emakhaya abo baye ezindaweni ezikude namadolobha nemisebenzi.

items: Imiphakathi yonke yasuswa emakhaya futhi imizi yayo yadilizwa.
Umhlaba osendaweni engcono cishe njalo wawubekelwa izakhamuzi ezimhlophe.
Ukususwa okwaziwayo kwakubandakanya iDistrict Six eKapa neSophiatown eGoli.

media.alt: A city map split into separate coloured zones by a boundary line.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='16' width='90' height='60' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='114' y='16' width='90' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='16' y='84' width='90' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='114' y='84' width='90' height='60' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='108' y='12' width='4' height='136' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='12' y='78' width='196' height='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Xhumanisa lo mthetho nendawo yansuku zonke abafundi abangase bayibone emadolobheni abo - amaningi amadolobha aseNingizimu Afrika asabonisa leli phethini lobandlululo. ISophiatown iphinde ivele emaslayidini amabili kamuva njengesibonelo, ngakho tshala imbewu lapha. Buza: kunjani ukutshelwa ukuthi ikhaya lakho manje lisendaweni 'engalungile'?

slides.title: Suppression of Communism Act, 1950
slides.lead: Umthetho owawubhalwe ngokubanzi kangangokuthi ungathulisa cishe noma ubani omelana nobandlululo.

blocks.text: Lo Mthetho wavimbela iCommunist Party, kodwa wachaza 'ubukhomanisi' ngokubanzi kangangokuthi wawungasetshenziswa kunoma **ubani owayephikisa inqubomgomo kahulumeni**. UNgqongqoshe wayengase 'avimbele' abantu - anciphise ukuhamba kwabo, abathulise futhi abavimbele emihlanganweni - ngaphandle kokuthethwa kwecala.

items: Izishoshovu zazingase 'zifakwe ohlwini', zivinjelwe noma zidingiswe emakhaya azo.
Ukuvinjelwa kwakwenza kube icala kubaholi abaningi ukukhuluma esidlangalaleni noma ukucashunwa.
Umbuso wawusebenzisa lo mthetho kuwo wonke ama-1950s ukwenza buthaka ukumelana.

media.alt: A speech bubble crossed out by a red line, symbolising silenced voices.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 40 h120 a12 12 0 0 1 12 12 v44 a12 12 0 0 1 -12 12 h-58 l-24 22 v-22 h-38 a12 12 0 0 1 -12 -12 v-44 a12 12 0 0 1 12 -12 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><line x1='30' y1='118' x2='176' y2='34' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='10' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lona ngumthetho 'wokulawula'. Yenza kucace ingozi yomthetho ongacacile: ngenxa yokuthi 'ubukhomanisi' bbuchazwe ngokungaqondile, uhulumeni wayengathulisa abezinyunyana zabasebenzi, abaholi bamasonto namaliberal ababengahlangene nokukhomanisi. Xhumanisa nombono wombuso wombuso wezomthetho - lapha isijeziso safika ngaphandle kokuthethwa kwecala okulungile.

slides.title: Bantu Education Act, 1953
slides.lead: Imfundo eyayenziwe iphansi ngamabomu ukuze kugcinwe izingane ezimnyama emisebenzini eholelwa kancane.

blocks.text: Uhulumeni wathatha ukulawula imfundo yabantwana abamnyama emasontweni nasezinkonzweni ezaziphethe izikole eziningi. U-**Hendrik Verwoerd**, uNgqongqoshe owayengaphezulu, wenza kwacaca inhloso: ukuqeqeshela izingane ezimnyama impilo yokusebenza nobugqila kuphela, hhayi amathuba alinganayo.

items: Izikole zabantu abamnyama zaziphiwa imali encane kakhulu kunezikole zabamhlophe.
Ikharikhulamu yanciphisa lokho abafundi abamnyama abakufundiswayo.
Intukuthelo ngeBantu Education yondla ukumelana amashumi eminyaka, kwaze kwaba u-1976.

media.alt: An open book with unequal stacks of coins beside two school buildings.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M30 60 q40 -16 78 0 v58 q-38 -14 -78 0 Z' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M112 60 q40 -16 78 0 v58 q-40 -14 -78 0 Z' fill='#3f6b45'/><line x1='110' y1='58' x2='110' y2='120' stroke='#1f3a24' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='150' y='96' width='14' height='34' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='168' y='114' width='14' height='16' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Caphuna noma uchaze ngamafuphi inhloso kaVerwoerd ngokucophelela ezingeni leBanga 9: imfundo yasetshenziswa njengethuluzi lokunciphisa ikusasa lezingane ezimnyama. Dweba umugqa oya phambili - ukuvukela kwaseSoweto ngo-1976, abafundi abakuhlangabezanayo eyunithini elilandelayo, kwaqubuka intukuthelo ngeBantu Education. Lokhu kubonisa ukuthi umthetho wawo-1950s wawunemiphumela amashumi eminyaka.

slides.title: Ubandlululo luyakheka, 1948-1956

events.label: Imithetho i-Population Registration, i-Group Areas ne-Suppression of Communism
I-Freedom Charter iyamukelwa; ukususwa kweSophiatown kuyaqala

slides.notes: Sebenzisa leli slayidi ukuhlanganisa ngaphambi kokusuka 'emithethweni' uye 'ekumelaneni'. Cela abafundi baqaphele iphethini: umthamo wemithetho yobandlululo ngo-1950, bese kuvela igagasi elikhulayo lombhikisho kusukela ngo-1952 kuya phambili. Ingxenye esele yesifundo ilandela lokho kumelana.

slides.title: I-Defiance Campaign, 1952
slides.lead: Izinkulungwane zephula imithetho yobandlululo ngamabomu ukugcwalisa amajele nokubonisa ukwenqaba kwabo uhlelo.

blocks.text: Yethulwa ngomhla ka-26 Juni 1952 yi-**African National Congress (ANC)** kanye ne-**South African Indian Congress**, amavolontiya ephula imithetho engenabo ubulungiswa ngamabomu - esebenzisa izinsiza 'zabamhlophe kuphela' futhi ephikisa ama-curfew - futhi amukela ukuboshwa ngaphandle kodlame.

items: Lena kwakuyikhampeyini yokuqala enkulu, yezinhlanga eziningi yokumelana ngokungenadlame.
Abaholi babebandakanya u-Nelson Mandela, u-Walter Sisulu no-James Moroka.
Ubulungu be-ANC bakhula ngokushesha njengoba ikhampeyini isabalala ezweni lonke.

media.alt: A line of marching figures raising their hands.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='45' cy='52' r='12'/><rect x='38' y='66' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='95' cy='48' r='12'/><rect x='88' y='62' width='14' height='46'/><circle cx='145' cy='52' r='12'/><rect x='138' y='66' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='195' cy='46' r='12'/><rect x='188' y='60' width='14' height='48'/></g><rect x='36' y='120' width='170' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela isu: ukungalaleli komphakathi ngaphandle kodlame, okwagqugquzelwa ngokwengxenye ukumelana ngokuthula kwangaphambili. Inhloso kwakuyingcindezi yokuziphatha kanye nezinombolo eziningi, hhayi amandla. Phawula ukuze kuxoxwe ngempendulo kahulumeni - i-Defiance Campaign yaholela ngokuqondile emithethweni enzima nangokuhamba kwesikhathi eTreason Trial (islayidi sokugcina).

slides.title: Ukususwa kweSophiatown
slides.lead: Idolobhana laseGoli elalinempilo, elixubile, elabhujiswa ukuze kuqiniswe i-Group Areas Act.

blocks.text: ISophiatown yayingenye yezindawo ezimbalwa lapho abantu abamnyama baseNingizimu Afrika babengaba khona nomhlaba, futhi yayidumele umculo wayo nempilo yomphakathi. Kusukela ngomhla ka-9 Februwari 1955 uhulumeni waqala **ukususa ngenkani** izakhamuzi eziyisa eMeadowlands eSoweto futhi ediliza imizi yazo.

items: Izakhamuzi zabhikisha ngesiqubulo esithi 'Ons dak nie, ons phola hier' (asisuki).
Indawo yakhelwa kabusha izakhamuzi ezimhlophe futhi yaqanjwa kabusha ngokuthi 'Triomf' (ukunqoba).
ISophiatown yaba uphawu lwalokho okwabhujiswa ukususwa ngenkani.

media.alt: A row of houses with one being demolished, dust rising.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='24' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='20' y='84' width='44' height='36'/><rect x='74' y='84' width='44' height='36'/></g><path d='M18 84 L42 62 L66 84 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 84 L96 62 L120 84 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='132' y='96' width='40' height='24'/><rect x='150' y='104' width='10' height='10' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><circle cx='198' cy='70' r='16' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='214' cy='84' r='12' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='186' cy='90' r='10' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa iSophiatown ukwenza i-Group Areas Act ibonakale futhi ibe ngeyabantu. Buyela emuva eslayidini 6. Sho ukubaluleka kwayo kwamasiko (ababhali, abaculi benkathi ye-Drum) ukuze abafundi babone ukuthi ukususwa akubhubhisanga izakhiwo kuphela kodwa nendlela yokuphila. Ukuqanjwa kabusha ngokuthi 'Triomf' kubonisa ukuthi uhulumeni wayegubha lokhu kubhujiswa.

slides.title: I-Congress of the People ne-Freedom Charter
slides.lead: Ngomhla ka-26 Juni 1955 cishe abamele abangu-3 000 bahlangana eKliptown ukusho uhlobo lwezwe abalufunayo.

blocks.text: Abantu Bayobusa! INingizimu Afrika ingeyabo bonke abahlala kuyo, abamnyama nabamhlophe.

I-**Congress of the People** yahlelwa yi-Congress Alliance. Abamele baqoqa izidingo ezweni lonke bazifaka ku-**Freedom Charter**, isitatimende samalungelo nenkululeko abantu ababeyifuna kwiNingizimu Afrika yentando yeningi.

items: Yayifuna amalungelo alinganayo, umhlaba, umsebenzi nemfundo kubo bonke.
Kamuva yalolonga izindinganiso zoMthethosisekelo wentando yeningi waseNingizimu Afrika.
Amaphoyisa ahlakaza usuku lwesibili lwalowo mhlangano futhi abhala phansi abakhona.

slides.notes: Qhathanisa leli slayidi nemithetho yobandlululo: nangu umbono omunye. Chaza i-Congress Alliance ngamafuphi (i-ANC nabalingani bayo abamele imiphakathi ehlukene). Phawula umugqa oqondile ovela kwi-Freedom Charter uye kuMthethosisekelo ka-1996 - umbhalo wawo-1950s owalolonga intando yeningi eminyakeni engu-40 kamuva. Ukubhekwa kwesixuku ngamaphoyisa kuxhumanisa naphambili eTreason Trial.

slides.title: I-Women's March, 1956
slides.lead: Cishe abesifazane abangu-20 000 bamasha baya eUnion Buildings bemelana nemithetho yamapasi kubesifazane.

blocks.text: Behlelwe nge-**Federation of South African Women (FEDSAW)**, abesifazane bazo zonke izinhlanga bamasha baya eUnion Buildings ePitoli bebhikisha izinhlelo zokwelulela imithetho yamapasi eyayizondwa kubesifazane abamnyama. Bashiya izinkulungwane zezicelo ezisayiniwe ehhovisi likaNdunankulu uStrijdom.

items: Abaholi babebandakanya u-Lilian Ngoyi, u-Helen Joseph, u-Rahima Moosa no-Sophia Williams-De Bruyn.
Abamashi bacula 'Wathint' abafazi, wathint' imbokodo' (uthinta abesifazane, uthinta itshe).
Umhla ka-9 Agasti manje ugujwa minyaka yonke njengoSuku Lukazwelonke Lwabesifazane.

media.alt: A large crowd of figures in front of a domed government building.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='60' y='40' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M96 40 q24 -26 48 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='72' y='52' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='160' y='52' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='108' r='9'/><circle cx='66' cy='104' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='110' r='9'/><circle cx='118' cy='104' r='9'/><circle cx='144' cy='110' r='9'/><circle cx='170' cy='104' r='9'/><circle cx='196' cy='108' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='122' width='196' height='22' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka phambili ubuholi babesifazane - ithuba lokwandisa umfanekiso wabafundi womzabalazo ngale kwamadoda adumile. Chaza ukuthi yayiyini imithetho yamapasi (amaphepha alawula ukuhamba) nokuthi kungani ukuwelulela kubesifazane kwakuzondwa kangaka. Xhumanisa nesikhathi samanje: uSuku Lwabesifazane Lukazwelonke lwenza lo mcimbi ube ingxenye yekhalenda labafundi.

slides.title: I-Treason Trial nalokho esikufundile
slides.lead: NgoDisemba 1956 uhulumeni wabopha abaholi abangu-156 wababeka icala lokuvukela umbuso.

blocks.text: Uhulumeni wabeka **izishoshovu ezingu-156** icala lokuvukela umbuso, ethi i-Freedom Charter iyabufakazela uzungu lwodlame lokuketula umbuso. Icala lahamba iminyaka; ekugcineni **bonke abamangalelwa batholwa bengenacala**. Kwabonisa kokubili ukuzimisela kombuso ukucindezela ukumelana kanye nokuqina komzabalazo.

blocks.question: Kungani u-1948 uchazwa njengeqophelo elishintshayo emlandweni waseNingizimu Afrika?
Khetha umthetho owodwa wawo-1950s uchaze ukuthi wehlukanisa noma walawula kanjani izimpilo zabantu.
Chaza izindlela ezimbili abantu baseNingizimu Afrika abamelana ngazo nobandlululo ngawo-1950s.

slides.notes: Vala isikhala: ukumelana kwangaphambi kwawo-1950s (i-Defiance Campaign, i-Freedom Charter) kwabangela i-Treason Trial, kodwa umbuso wehluleka ukuthola noyedwa enecala. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yekilasi; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kufana nezitayela zeCAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nezokubhala okwelulekile. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi lokhu kubeka isisekelo seyunithi elilandelayo (iSharpeville 1960, iSoweto 1976, ukukhululwa kukaMandela 1990).
